extra.reason: Implemented Hono Worker slide editor PoC, MDX-like parser/renderer, and Cloudflare Agents integration seam.
Implemented Hono Worker slide editor PoC, MDX-like parser/renderer, and Cloudflare Agents integration seam.
Implemented Hono Worker slide editor PoC, MDX-like parser/renderer, and Cloudflare Agents integration seam.
Added honoSlides middleware, exports, tests, and README usage.
Added manifest compile CLI, package bin/script, docs, and tests.
Added createLocalDevSlidesApp helper, filesystem-backed dev router coverage, README usage, and passing check.
Implemented iframe viewer wrapper, fixed-size presentation route, cross-frame controls/state, draft/dev coverage, and passing npm run check.
Implemented AIChatAgent-based SlideAssistant, approval-gated proposal workflow, viewer chat persistence/diff UX, sample docs, and passing bun run check.
Aligned agents to 0.15.0 so @cloudflare/ai-chat can import required agents/chat exports; verified wrangler dry-run bundle and bun run check.
Started local wrangler dev on port 8791 and verified /decks/sample in browser: viewer controls, Hero rendering, chat response, proposal Apply, iframe reload, and editor markdown update.
Implemented public viewer, render route, and edit-scoped controls
Replaced preview event polling with SSE streaming, heartbeat, and edit-preview live reload suppression
Fixed edit page overflow and scaled preview iframe rendering
Implemented tabbed left-pane chat/MDX editor with hono/jsx/dom client tabs and verified sample edit UI.
Completed chat transcript, mode selection, session id, proposal approval card, and apply flow for the edit Agent panel.
Grounded Agent chat in current MDX, inferred edit intent as code mode, rejected ungrounded Workers AI responses, and verified proposal apply flow.
Removed visible consultation/edit mode switch and kept server-side edit intent inference for single chat input.
Displayed proposal patch/replacement changes before Apply and verified proposal card details.
Stored recent JSON chat turns in SlideAssistant state and used them for follow-up edit proposals.
Kept mode detection current-turn-first and handled greetings locally before Workers AI.
Unified edit-mode message and proposal generation around a single edit plan, with regression coverage.
Removed fixed/heuristic chat fallbacks; agent/chat now returns explicit JSON errors when Agent route, Workers AI, or Code Mode cannot produce a usable response. Verified with bun run check.

Code Mode generation now parses proposals from AI SDK tool results and earlier steps, not just final text JSON. Prompt now asks Code Mode to return a proposal object. Sample route covers Agent-returned proposal path. Verified with bun run check.

Browser verification now passes for sample title edit: chat creates a visible proposal, Apply updates MDX and preview iframe. Added explicit title-command proposal path, Code Mode title tool, manual Code Mode tool execution for AI SDK results without toolResults, and tests. Verified with bun run check.
Removed title-biased Code Mode tool/prompting, rejected title-only proposals for non-title instructions, added add-intent coverage, and verified with bun run check plus local chat route checks.

Completed by the same fix as hono_slides-ylo: removed createTitlePatch from Code Mode exposure, removed title-only prompt example, reject title-only proposals for non-title instructions, and verified check/dev route.
Split src implementation files into feature directories and updated imports; bun run check passes.

Preserved edit implementation on feature/edit-layer, removed agent/editor implementation from MVP main, and kept viewer router extension/live-reload hooks for future edit reintegration. Verified with bun run check.
Implemented Bun workspace monorepo with package and basic sample split; verified with bun run check.
Converted the basic example to a directory-based deck manifest flow and verified with bun run check.
Added build-ready dist exports and Node-compatible CLI bin for manifest generation; verified with bun run check.
Separated parser, renderer, compiler, generator, source, and routing modules out of deck; verified with bun run check.
Implemented AST-based MDX parsing, Hono JSX slide component rendering, and client island helper.
Moved the basic sample slide component exports into decks/sample/components and kept the Worker entrypoint as thin wiring.
Implemented --components-out registry generation with hashed deck-local component names.
Renamed package/API to @hono/decks and decksRouter, added defineDecks wiring, and documented style/clientEntry use cases.
Generated src/generated/decks.ts with decksRouter(options), removed the hand-written sample src/decks.ts adapter, and verified with bun run check.
Implemented module-backed @mdx-js/mdx generation, generated decks router, deck-local component wiring, and updated tests/docs.
Added a sample client island Counter component, Worker-served client entry script, tests, and fixed island wrapper rendering.
Reworked the sample client island to bundle a Hono JSX DOM entry with hydrateSlideIslands and useState.
Moved the sample Hono JSX DOM client entry next to the sample deck and updated the client bundle script/docs.
Moved sample client code under components/client and generated bundled client entries from hono-decks compile.
Implemented generated hashed client island registry and removed manual deck-local hydrate registration.
Implemented viewer customization, deckContext, shared viewer parts, docs, sample usage, and tests.
Added sample layout pages and serveDecksClientEntry helper to simplify client entry asset wiring.
Generated decksRouter now auto-serves generated client entry assets from the mounted router, and examples/tests/docs no longer require manual client asset wiring.
Sample pages now use hono/jsx components instead of manual HTML string assembly, and src/**/*.tsx is included in the example typecheck.
examples/basic/src/index.ts is now focused on Hono route composition; sample viewer CSS moved to pages.tsx, empty bindings and app-entry re-export were removed.
examples/basic/src/pages.tsx now uses Hono's hono/css Style/css helper for page CSS while keeping router viewer.style as raw CSS for the package API.
Deck viewer options now support a JSX head slot, sample viewer styling uses hono/css Style via viewer.head, and docs/tests cover the new behavior.
Public render surfaces now use DeckRenderable/MaybePromise Hono JSX types instead of broad unknown, while data parsing unknowns remain intentional.
Added withR2Assets source wrapper, connected basic sample to optional R2 asset binding, documented the pattern, and verified cache header behavior with tests.
Made generated MDX asset URL rewriting idempotent and added regression coverage for plain local asset names.
Added docs/verification-matrix.md and linked it from README to track media, embed, code, animation, accessibility, export, and operational verification cases.
Added docs/verification-priorities.md with recommended implementation order and linked it from the verification matrix.
Removed fixed 1920x1080 iframe/stage sizing from the viewer shell, made iframe follow its parent viewport, and added package/sample regression tests.
Separated render viewport from the 1920x1080 deck canvas and added fitDeck scaling so the canvas scales into the iframe while preserving its aspect ratio.
Added media deck asset verification coverage and local asset cache headers.
Added code deck fenced code coverage, default code block presentation styles, and documented the CodeBlock/highlighting direction.
Validated client island props as JSON values, added failures for non-JSON props with component context, and updated docs.
Added CLI diagnostics coverage for MDX compile failures and wrapped errors with source path and slide index.
Runtime render errors now return clear 500 responses with deck source path and slide index, covered by router tests and docs.
Built-in CodeBlock component and code deck sample are implemented; build-time syntax highlighting remains tracked separately in hono-slides-h0p.
Build-time syntax highlighting now runs through Shiki during generated module compilation; runtime renders generated highlighted HTML without importing Shiki in Worker-safe exports.
Built-in EmbedFrame and media deck examples now cover YouTube and generic iframe embeds with sandbox, lazy loading, permissions, aspect ratio, and fallback links.

Built-in SocialEmbed now provides script-free SNS quote/link fallback, media sample and tests cover X-style content, and README documents app-owned CSP responsibilities for iframe, image, client entry, and third-party SNS scripts.

Standard viewer now has heading metadata, focusable viewport, iframe title coverage, pointer swipe command wiring, reduced-motion CSS in viewer and presentation documents, and docs distinguish package-level coverage from remaining browser/device smoke checks.

Added bun run smoke:viewport browser smoke workflow for the basic example. It starts wrangler dev, verifies sample/code/media render routes, checks desktop and mobile iframe viewport framing, keyboard navigation, browser-side pointer swipe dispatch, control contrast, and writes screenshots outside the repo by default.
Added DeckTheme API for trusted theme styles, components, and slide layout wrappers; documented style/viewer boundaries; covered renderer and router paths with tests.

Added examples/basic/decks/motion with CSS animation, reduced-motion CSS, and a deck-local hono/jsx/dom MotionMeter island; generated router/client modules include the motion deck; sample tests and browser viewport smoke cover it.

Documented slide transition and fragment/step semantics in docs/slide-dynamics.md, added an implementation plan at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-slide-transitions-fragments.md, updated verification docs, and created hono-slides-abt for implementation.
Implemented slide transition and fragment navigation with tests, sample, docs, and smoke verification.
Added a focused basic sample custom DeckSource decorator around withR2Assets, documented the runtime R2 boundary, and covered embedded vs R2 asset headers with tests and viewport smoke.
Implemented Zenn-style embed shorthand and /:::fire reveal syntax with tests, docs, and sample updates.
Added explicit @[embed]/@[iframe] shorthand and single-line URL link handling with sample, docs, generated output, and tests.
Made EmbedFrame fallback links open externally and replaced the media placeholder remote image with an R2-backed generated asset sample covered by tests and viewport smoke.
Made YouTube shorthand keep the iframe embed URL while using the watch URL for the fallback external link.
Added @[x-post](url) syntax, a TweetEmbed built-in component, and media sample coverage for the requested Hono post URL.
Changed @[x](url) to render TweetEmbed by default and removed x-post from the public authoring syntax.
Added build-time best-effort OGP resolution for @[card](url), LinkCard OGP rendering, docs, and tests.
Updated the media deck LinkCard sample and tests to use the requested Zenn article URL.
Updated the media deck LinkCard sample and tests to use https://yusukebe.com/.
Updated LinkCard CSS to use a left thumbnail and right metadata layout with a stacked mobile fallback.
Removed deck padding and made slides border-box in the base presentation styles.
Removed the base slide border radius and added a regression assertion.
Added deployed R2 cache smoke command, sample R2 binding, custom domain route, docs, and tests. Live smoke is blocked until hono-decks-basic.tslab.app DNS provisioning completes.
Viewport smoke now verifies motion fragment progression through iframe DOM/root data attributes while keeping controller text slide-only.
Changed the default viewer position text to slide-only and exposed step state via root data attributes for custom controllers.
Added package print CSS, compiled-render regression coverage, PDF smoke script, root/example scripts, and verification docs.
Changed print output to A4 portrait handout with margins and 3-up slide grouping, updated PDF smoke expectations and docs.
Added /:slug/print route, print preview rendering mode, sample link, PDF smoke route update, and route/docs coverage.
Removed decorative base stage/slide/iframe backgrounds and moved sample deck backgrounds to layout class styling.
